description.zh-Hans: 基于透明通道/颜色过渡的像素级完美描边检测。扫描内部/外部区域之间的硬过渡，在精灵边界周围生成清晰的1像素轮廓，支持角落连接控制。与基于Sobel算子的OutlineNode不同，此节点专为需要精确轮廓控制和干净角落的像素艺术精灵设计。
description.en: Pixel-perfect outline detection based on alpha/color transitions. Scans for hard transitions between inside/outside regions to produce crisp 1px outlines around sprite boundaries with corner join control. Unlike the Sobel-based OutlineNode, this is designed for pixel art sprites where precise silhouette control and clean corners are required.

triggers.zh-Hans: 像素描边, 精确描边, 像素完美描边, 精灵描边
triggers.en: pixel perfect outline, crisp outline, sprite border, edge outline

exampleUsage.zh-Hans: 为像素艺术角色添加像素完美的外部描边线。
exampleUsage.en: Add a pixel-perfect outline to a pixel art character.
